variants: At Cinder Sparrow Chocolates, Solenne Herve applies her extensive knowledge and passion for chocolate to create exquisite confections. Originally from Driftleaf Warren, she has journeyed to her current home in Starcaller Crescent, where she resides today. In recognition of her exceptional work within the industry, she received the esteemed Lotus Veil Emblem. Alongside her culinary pursuits, Solenne authored the innovative book titled Moonfern Storage Panel, which provides insights into modern storage techniques. Her contributions reflect her dedication to both the art of chocolate making and the realm of invention.
